_meta.author: dhileepkumargm
_meta.title: Arcane Orb
_meta.description: the generative noise, mouse interaction, and vibrant color manipulation in your references, I've designed an "Interactive Arcane Orb." This component features a central, glowing orb that follows your mouse, surrounded by a swirling vortex of energy. The entire scene is generated in real-time with a custom GLSL shader, creating a dynamic and visually captivating experience.
